channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Industry figures challenge Hassabis on AI regulation and AGI distribution
item.description: Critics warn of regulatory capture and incentives against renting AGI.
item.content:encoded:
Critics warn of regulatory capture and incentives against renting AGI.

Original source: https://x.com/demishassabis

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/efz7fwvw

  • Views: 20,283
  • Likes: 171
  • Bookmarks: 29
  • Quotes: 5
  • Replies: 37
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Emad
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Verena Rieser
  • Daniel Jeffries

item.title: New York Governor signs first statewide data center moratorium
item.description: The one-year pause aims to establish AI infrastructure safeguards.
item.content:encoded:
The one-year pause aims to establish AI infrastructure safeguards.

Original source: https://x.com/AOC

  • Views: 72,914

  • Bookmarks: 10
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 61
  • Posts: 5

  • @jason
  • Josh Wolfe
  • Zachary Nado

item.title: Spotify founder's Neko Health raises $700 million Series C
item.description: The funding will expand its AI preventive health clinics to New York.
item.content:encoded:
The funding will expand its AI preventive health clinics to New York.

Original source: https://x.com/HNilsonne

  • Views: 17,151

  • Bookmarks: 11
  • Replies: 18
  • Posts: 6

  • Harry Stebbings

item.title: OpenAI reportedly develops screen-free AI smart speaker with cameras
item.description: The rumored device sparked privacy concerns over daily life data collection.
item.content:encoded:
The rumored device sparked privacy concerns over daily life data collection.

Original source: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-14/openai-s-first-device-will-be-moveable-screenless-speaker-built-as-ai-companion?srnd=homepage-americas

item.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex team plans usage reset near 10 million milestone
item.description: Co-founder Benjamin Anderson approved resetting the usage limits this Friday.
item.content:encoded:
Co-founder Benjamin Anderson approved resetting the usage limits this Friday.

Original source: https://x.com/thsottiaux

item.title: Elon Musk says X will open-source its entire codebase after security audit
item.description: Third-party reviewers will verify that production code matches the open-source release.
item.content:encoded:
Third-party reviewers will verify that production code matches the open-source release.

Original source: https://x.com/elonmusk

  • Likes: 17,357

  • Quotes: 511
  • Replies: 1,994
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Brian Roemmele

item.title: X's Nikita Bier says algorithm update will fix repetitive timelines
item.description: X plans to deploy a solution by the end of the week.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: OpenAI offers $100 Codex credits for GPT-5.6 Sol feedback
item.description: Users must post feedback on social media to qualify.
item.content:encoded:
Users must post feedback on social media to qualify.

Original source: https://switch-to-codex.openai.chatgpt.site/

item.title: Booster Robotics releases T2 bipedal humanoid open development platform
item.description: The robot features 2070 TFLOPS onboard compute and its own IDE.
item.content:encoded:
The robot features 2070 TFLOPS onboard compute and its own IDE.

Original source: https://x.com/boosterobotics

item.title: DeepSeek targets $500M annualized sales and plans 2027 STAR Market IPO
item.description: Founder Liang Wenfeng retains control using a limited partnership structure.
item.content:encoded:
Founder Liang Wenfeng retains control using a limited partnership structure.

Original source: https://www.theinformation.com/articles/deepseeks-annualized-revenue-nears-500-million-boosting-fundraise-ipo-plans
